nasb.text: The rest of Israel, of the priests and of the Levites, were in all the cities of Judah, each on his own inheritance.

esv.text: And the rest of Israel, and of the priests and the Levites, were in all the towns of Judah, every one in his inheritance.

cnv.text: 其餘的以色列人、祭司、利未人各住在猶大眾城自己的地業中。

ccb.text: 其他以色列人、祭司和利未人住在犹大各城自己的地方。
